events.name: Mt. Rose Ski Tahoe - Weekend Skiing
events.price_note: Lift tickets vary by day; season passes and multi-day discounts available
events.description: Hit the slopes at Mt. Rose Ski Tahoe, one of the closest ski resorts to Reno with over 1,200 skiable acres. Late February typically offers excellent snow conditions with some of the best terrain of the season.

events.name: UNR Wolf Pack Men's Basketball
events.price_note: Student tickets available with valid UNR ID
events.description: Cheer on the Nevada Wolf Pack men's basketball team in Mountain West Conference action at Lawlor Events Center. Check the UNR athletics site for the specific opponent and latest ticket availability.

events.name: Reno Philharmonic Orchestra Concert
events.location: Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts
events.price_note: Discounts for students, seniors, and military
events.description: The Reno Philharmonic Orchestra presents a captivating evening of classical music at the historic Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts in downtown Reno. Enjoy world-class performances in an intimate setting.

events.name: Live Music at the Knitting Factory
events.description: The Knitting Factory hosts live rock and indie acts in its intimate downtown Reno venue. One of Reno's most consistent live music destinations, featuring local favorites and touring national acts.

events.name: Nevada Museum of Art - Gallery Tours & Exhibitions
events.price_note: Free for members; children under 6 free
events.description: Explore the Nevada Museum of Art's rotating and permanent collections featuring regional and contemporary art. The museum regularly hosts special exhibitions, films, and educational programs throughout the year.

events.name: National Automobile Museum - Self-Guided Tour
events.price_note: Children under 6 free; AAA discount available
events.description: Discover over 200 rare and classic automobiles spanning the history of transportation at this world-class museum. Street scenes and period settings bring automotive history to life for visitors of all ages.

events.name: Comedy Night at Silver Legacy Resort
events.description: Laugh the night away with stand-up comedy at Silver Legacy Resort Casino's entertainment venue in the heart of downtown Reno. Featuring regional and national touring comedians every weekend.

events.name: Wilbur D. May Museum - Family Discovery Day
events.price_note: Children under 2 free; combination ticket with arboretum available
events.description: The Wilbur D. May Museum at Rancho San Rafael Park offers interactive exhibits on the life of adventurer Wilbur D. May, including artifacts from his world travels and the popular Children's Wetland Adventure.

events.name: Nevada Humane Society Weekend Pet Adoption Event
events.price_note: Adoption fees apply if you adopt a pet
events.description: Nevada Humane Society hosts weekend adoption events where dogs, cats, and other animals find their forever homes. Come meet adoptable pets and learn about the society's foster and volunteer programs.

events.name: UNR Wolf Pack Women's Basketball
events.price_note: UNR students free with valid ID
events.description: Support the Nevada Wolf Pack women's basketball team as they compete in Mountain West Conference play. Lawlor Events Center provides an energetic atmosphere for Reno's college basketball fans.

events.name: Jub Jub's Thirst Parlor - Live Jazz & Blues Night
events.price_note: No cover; drink purchases appreciated
events.description: Jub Jub's Thirst Parlor is a beloved Midtown Reno bar known for its eclectic atmosphere and live jazz and blues nights. An intimate venue perfect for a laid-back midweek outing with great local talent.

events.name: Whitney Peak Hotel Basecamp - Rock Climbing
events.price_note: Gear rental available; introductory lessons offered for beginners
events.description: Scale the world's tallest artificial outdoor climbing wall at Whitney Peak Hotel's Basecamp climbing complex in downtown Reno. The 164-foot wall and indoor bouldering gym offer challenges for every skill level.

events.name: Cargo Concert Hall - Live Music Night
events.description: Cargo Concert Hall in Midtown Reno delivers an eclectic lineup of live music in an intimate setting. The venue regularly hosts local favorites and touring national acts across multiple genres.

events.name: Midtown Reno First Friday Art Walk
events.price_note: Free to walk; individual galleries and shops may charge for special events
events.description: Reno's First Friday Art Walk transforms Midtown into a vibrant cultural celebration with open galleries, artist studios, live music, and local vendors. Stroll through one of Reno's most creative and walkable neighborhoods.

events.name: Diamond Peak Ski Resort - Weekend Skiing
events.price_note: Discounts for afternoon sessions and multi-day passes; ski school lessons available
events.description: Diamond Peak offers stunning Lake Tahoe views and family-friendly skiing with a relaxed, less-crowded atmosphere. Excellent grooming and accessible beginner terrain make it ideal for families and all skill levels.

events.name: Grand Sierra Resort - Weekend Headline Entertainment
events.price_note: Hotel and dining packages available; check GSR website for current lineup
events.description: The Grand Sierra Resort features top-tier entertainment in its Grand Theatre, including nationally touring musicians, comedians, and tribute acts. One of Reno's premier destinations for weekend nightlife and entertainment.

events.name: Terry Lee Wells Nevada Discovery Museum
events.location: Terry Lee Wells Nevada Discovery Museum
events.price_note: Children under 1 free; members free
events.description: The Nevada Discovery Museum offers interactive science and cultural exhibits designed for curious kids and families. Weekend programming includes special demonstrations, hands-on activities, and themed learning experiences.

events.name: Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts - Weekend Show
events.location: Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts
events.price_note: Student rush tickets may be available 30 minutes before showtime
events.description: The Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts presents touring Broadway productions and major performing arts events in its stunning downtown Reno venue. Check the Pioneer Center calendar for the current weekend's specific production.
events.source_name: Pioneer Center for the Performing Arts

events.name: Reno Roller Kingdom - Family Skate Night
events.price_note: Skate rentals an additional $3–$4
events.description: Reno Roller Kingdom hosts family skate nights with a DJ spinning music while kids and adults roll around the rink together. A beloved Reno tradition for families looking for affordable weekend fun.

events.name: The Depot - Live Music Saturday
events.description: The Depot combines a craft brewery with a live music venue, hosting local and regional bands in its converted train depot space. Saturday nights are among Reno's best live entertainment experiences.

events.name: Midtown Reno Craft Beer Tour
events.price_note: Individual purchases at each brewery; self-guided tour, no booking required
events.description: Explore Reno's thriving craft beer scene with a self-guided tour of Midtown and downtown breweries, including Lead Dog Brewing, Brasserie Saint James, and others all within easy walking distance.

events.name: Sparks Marina Park - Weekend Outdoor Recreation
events.description: Sparks Marina Park offers a beautiful man-made lake with walking paths, fishing spots, and open green space. A perfect destination for families and outdoor enthusiasts on mild late-winter and early spring days.

events.name: Truckee River Wingfield Park Walk & Picnic
events.description: Enjoy a walk along the Truckee River at Wingfield Park in the heart of downtown Reno. The park and adjacent river trail offer a scenic urban escape perfect for families, joggers, and anyone soaking in the early signs of spring.

events.name: Atlantis Casino Resort - Weekend Poker Tournament
events.price_note: Buy-in required for tournament play; check Atlantis website for current buy-in amounts
events.description: Atlantis Casino Resort hosts regular weekend poker tournaments drawing players from across the region. The card room offers multiple game formats from No Limit Hold'em to Omaha with competitive prize pools.

events.name: Edgewood Tahoe - Après Ski Dining & Cocktails
events.price_note: Reservations recommended for dining; bar seating is walk-in
events.description: Wrap up a weekend of skiing with après ski dining and cocktails at Edgewood Tahoe, offering breathtaking views of Lake Tahoe. The resort's restaurants are a premier destination for food lovers visiting the lake.

events.name: Reno Tahoe Open Mic Night - Multiple Venues
events.price_note: No cover at most venues; drink minimum may apply
events.description: Reno's vibrant open mic scene comes alive on weeknights across various Midtown and downtown bars. Catch emerging local musicians, comedians, and spoken word artists in intimate settings throughout the city.
